title: Creating a custom reminder option within the conversation on tasks.
excerpt: on top of the already pre set reminder options in conversations, please add ‘custom reminder’ also to allow us to create our own reminder timelines

posts.author: KaityBrosnan (Kaity Brosnan)
posts.cookedHtml: on top of the already pre set reminder options in conversations, please add ‘custom reminder’ also to allow us to create our own reminder timelines
